idea-plugin.name: Cloude Code ToolBox
idea-plugin.description:
Claude Code toolbox - JetBrains preview.

What you get today
  • JCEF: the same hub UI as VS Code (exported HTML) with a Kotlin bridge.
  • MCP & skills hub: registry and skills.sh search, MCP install from registry into workspace mcp.json, turn off/on/delete servers (stash files), local skills scan, skill hub toggles, skills CLI install (npx skills add), kit snapshot, .cloude/toolbox-settings.json for auto-scan and Thinking Machine flags.
  • Open / reveal paths from the hub via the IDE.
  • Settings: Settings → Tools → Cloude Code ToolBox edits .cloude/toolbox-settings.json (hub flags, npx tag, Insiders paths, optional Node path).
  • VS Code command parity: every CloudeCodeToolBox.* command maps to a JetBrains implementation — hub + MCP list/add, bundled MCP recipes, Copilot/cursorrules merges, instruction picker, translate @-mentions, config scan, notepad → memory-bank, skill stub, verification checklist, first test task (gradlew/npm), npx CLIs, skills migrations (Cursor + Copilot), .vscode/settings.json toggles, browsers; remaining gaps are called out in notifications.
What ships first in VS Code
  • Full MCP & skills hub, One Click Setup, Intelligence flows, and bundled bridge CLIs.
Resources
  • Source code
  • Issue tracker
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 0.6.10: Point release — docs and repo README/static site highlight both the VS Code Marketplace and JetBrains plugin install; no functional change from 0.6.9.
  • 0.6.9: Merge-only parity — MCP port, memory bank, Cursor rules, and skills migration match VS Code merge-only behavior; One Click / hub bridge argv and settings normalization updated.
  • 0.6.8: Plugin Verifier — hub command bridge runs actions via ActionManager.tryToExecute (no AnAction.update, AnActionEvent.createFromAnAction, or ActionUtil.performActionDumbAwareWithCallbacks).
  • 0.6.7: Plugin Verifier — replace deprecated Messages.showChooseDialog / showOkCancelDialog with DialogWrapper list picker and MessageDialogBuilder; hub "reveal in file manager" uses RevealFileAction instead of ShowFilePathAction.openFile(File).
  • 0.6.6: Plugin ID — com.amitchorasiya.cloude.code.toolbox (JetBrains Marketplace forbids "intellij" in the id). If you installed an older build from disk, uninstall the previous plugin entry then install this version.
  • 0.6.5: Hub width — hub body fills the tool window again (removed fixed max-width that caused a narrow centered column on wide panels).
  • 0.6.4: Hub layout — max-width column (720px) so the hub doesn’t stretch empty on wide tool windows; slightly larger type; hero cards get a light shadow; bridge primary buttons use the same short labels on VS Code and JetBrains (npx vs bundled explained in the description text).
  • 0.6.3: Hub UX — hubHost from the IDE; JetBrains hub hides duplicate "npx vs bundled" bridge buttons, clearer One Click copy, Thinking Machine checkbox alignment, slightly roomier section cards.
  • 0.6.2: Bridge CLIs in-plugin — Cursor MCP port, Cursor rules → CLAUDE.md, and memory bank run via bundled monorepo CLIs (node …/cli.mjs) like the VS Code extension, not npx from the public npm registry. Build requires npm once to vendor cursor-rules-to-claude deps. Optional absolute node path still in Settings.
  • 0.6.1: One Click Setup — stepped wizard (runOneClickSetup / workspace wizard) matching VS Code order; choices persisted under oneClickSetup in .cloude/toolbox-settings.json; runs npx bridges, merges, awareness/readiness/scans.
  • 0.6.0: Full palette parity pass — MCP list/add (table + JSON paste), Copilot/GitHub skills → .agents, merge Copilot instructions & append .cursorrules, instruction file picker, translate @-mentions, config secret scan, notepad → memory-bank, SKILL.md stub, verification checklist, bundled MCP recipe, first test task (gradlew/npm); previews under .claude/.
  • 0.5.0: Broad VS Code parity layer — ToolboxParityDispatcher for all extension commands (npx CLIs, skills migration, hub refresh, kit open with args, Insiders user mcp path); CloudeHubBridge for hub refresh after CLI runs; expanded toolbox settings JSON.
  • 0.4.0: Settings page (Tools) for toolbox JSON; npx skills add in Run tool window; all hub CloudeCodeToolBox.* command ids registered (stubs + open workspace/user mcp.json, Claude user settings, settings dialog); JUnit tests for MCP JSON parsing.
  • 0.3.0: Hub parity pass — MCP registry/skills.sh HTTP search, MCP stash and mutations, registry install, skills CLI install, toolbox settings file, open/reveal paths, skill folder delete with root checks; runCommand tries IDE actions by ID.
  • 0.2.0: JCEF hub (exported VS Code HTML), JS–Kotlin bridge, partial hub state from project folder; notifications for unimplemented actions.
  • 0.1.0: Initial preview tool window.
